title: ctenopteris flabelliformis
intro: Ctenopteris flabelliformis, also known as the New Zealand fan fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of rheumatism and other inflammatory conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing swelling, pain, and fever, as well as improving digestion and respiratory function. The herbal preparations of Ctenopteris flabelliformis include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to make topical applications and internal remedies.
